message.content:
<deliberation>
Scope: Evaluate REG-039, REG-040, REG-030 against the provided policy chunk. Treat omissions as Non-Deviation. Include cross-references where the main node explicitly references another paragraph/article.

REG-039 (Art15(2)) analysis:
- Cross-reference: Art15(1) = REG-038 (explicitly referenced in the text of Art15(2)).
- Regulatory thrust: Duty on the Commission to encourage benchmarks/methodologies for measuring accuracy/robustness as set out in Art15(1).
- Policy text: Internal requirements to define performance metrics, error types, and evaluation plans. No claim about the Commission’s role; no contradiction. Absence of mention is an omission → Non-Deviation.

REG-040 (Art15(3)) analysis:
- Cross-references: None explicitly referenced.
- Regulatory thrust: Accuracy levels and metrics must be declared in the instructions of use.
- Policy text: Requires defining performance metrics and evaluation plans; does not mention “declared in the accompanying instructions of use.” This is an omission, not a contradiction → Non-Deviation.

REG-030 (Art13(6)) analysis:
- Cross-references: None provided/required.
- Regulatory thrust: Instructions of use include (iv) capabilities to explain outputs; (v) performance regarding specific persons/groups where appropriate.
- Policy text: Mentions performance metrics/error types/evaluation plan, but not explanatory capabilities or group-specific performance. These are omissions → Non-Deviation.
</deliberation>
